Challenge
Dwarven Legacy Amulet

For the duration of the battle, every 3 sec, the amulet wearer removes 2 random debuffs from a random ally and that unit goes into a frenzy. They increase in size and all their stats are increased by 15% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
